Overall, wi_skills produces a marginally more executive-level, relationship-preserving email with stronger narrative ownership, while wo_skills is structurally cleaner. The skill did add value in tone calibration and narrative flow, but the quality gap is narrow — both would function effectively as executive communications.

utility_details.utility_summary: wi_skills produces a higher quality follow-up email. The key differentiators are: (1) the subject line in wi_skills correctly uses 'Follow-Up on Executive Search Proposal' rather than the failing 'Checking In' pattern used by wo_skills; (2) wi_skills has a narrow, single CTA asking for a decision or status update, while wo_skills ends with three open-ended questions that dilute the ask; (3) wi_skills is more concise and disciplined in length.
